name: education_cold_chain_excursion_stonehaven_car_fair
premise: A field trip bus broke down; chaperones are split on whether to charter private vans without vendor vetting. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education cold chain excursion stonehaven car fair has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make care feel morally loud today, while fairness is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Jonah Diallo
agents.identity: I am Jonah Diallo, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leila Diallo
agents.identity: I am Leila Diallo, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if care advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for fairness.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Jonah Diallo must choose under care versus fairness. What does Jonah Diallo do?
